description:
You are a Health Informatics Specialist provisioning a new NextGen Connect instance for Mercy Community Hospital. Configure the server's Configuration Map with facility-specific integration parameters using the NextGen Connect REST API (https://localhost:8443/api, credentials admin/admin). Use the endpoint PUT /api/server/configurationMap with the header 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI'. The payload must use the XML format where the root element is <map> containing <entry> elements, each with a <string> key and a <com.mirth.connect.util.ConfigurationProperty> containing <value> and <comment>.

Required entries:

1. Key: FACILITY_CODE, Value: MCH001, Comment: Primary facility identifier code
2. Key: FACILITY_NAME, Value: Mercy Community Hospital, Comment: Full facility display name
3. Key: SENDING_APPLICATION, Value: NEXTGEN_CONNECT, Comment: HL7 MSH-3 Sending Application
4. Key: SENDING_FACILITY, Value: MCH, Comment: HL7 MSH-4 Sending Facility
5. Key: ADT_DESTINATION_HOST, Value: 10.10.50.25, Comment: ADT feed target system IP address
6. Key: ADT_DESTINATION_PORT, Value: 6661, Comment: ADT feed target system port
7. Key: ORM_DESTINATION_HOST, Value: 10.10.50.30, Comment: Order feed target system IP address
8. Key: ORM_DESTINATION_PORT, Value: 6662, Comment: Order feed target system port
9. Key: ENVIRONMENT, Value: PRODUCTION, Comment: Deployment environment identifier
10. Key: RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS, Value: 5, Comment: Maximum message retry attempts before error
